author: SantiMod
content:
The Friday Special: Working at Star Atlas  

Due to a very high demand from the community, we are bringing you a special event this Friday. It is what you've wanted to see and learn more about: An insider's view of the Star Atlas Team!
We will have two great Star Atlas team members as guests: Kelsey, the Chief Human Resources Officer, and Steven, the Head of Talent!  

What is it like to work at Star Atlas? What is the hiring process like? What are our company values?  What is our culture? What is our work environment like?  

Are you interested and want to know more about it? Join us this Friday! It will be structured as an open conversation for all community members! 

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/943635503733952532
